tagline: Wide selection to suit different applications
description: Premium elevator motors from leading manufacturers
longDescription: Verticales has been supplying Elevator motors to various Industries and for diverse applications. Our team of qualified & experienced Engineers & Technicians studies your requirement & shall suggest suitable motors for specific applications.

specifications.Brands: SHARP, Bharat Bijlee, Montanari Giulio, TORINDRIVE

advantages: Wide selection of motors for different applications
Expert engineering support for requirement analysis

description: New-generation gearless permanent magnet synchronous motor
longDescription: New-generation gearless machine for elevators are powered by a permanent magnet synchronous motor. Compact modular designs, light weight and low operating noise levels make it especially suitable for machine room-less applications. Real saving in energy consumption (up to 30%), and in space and routine maintenance requirements, contribute to a significant reduction in cost of ownership.
advantages: Suitable for elevators with or without machine room

tagline: Integrated drive and controller for superior performance
description: Variable Voltage Variable Frequency drives from premium brands
longDescription: While designing the elevator integrated drive and controller, a variety of factors, including elevators' safety and reliability, inherent characteristics of elevator operation, and potential energy load characteristic of elevators, are taken into consideration. In addition, the elevator integrated drive and controller offers improved performance, usage convenience, and economical efficiency, and it also features compact structure, small size, few wire connection and high reliability.

specifications.Brands: Monarch, FUJI ELECTRIC, Philbrick, ADCO CONTROLS

description: High-performance elevator control panels with dual processor
longDescription: The elevator integrated drive and controller is designed with closed loop vector controller for higher performance. Features dual 32-bit embedded microprocessor and is suitable for both synchronous and asynchronous motors.
advantages: Closed loop vector controller for higher performance
Zero-speed torque compensation without load weighing device
Dynamic PWM carrier modulation for reduced motor noise
Suitable for both synchronous and asynchronous motors

description: Premium wood finish cabin with LED ceiling
longDescription: Designer cabin featuring plastic laminate wood finish walls, PVC wood finish flooring, and LED ceiling with SS mirror finish for a sophisticated appearance.

description: Modern solid color cabin with tube lighting
longDescription: Designer cabin with plastic laminate solid color walls, patterned PVC flooring, and tube light ceiling with large diffuser for uniform illumination.
Bold designer cabin with painted metallic yellow walls, PVC smoke gray flooring, and CFL ceiling with white painted and black round diffuser.

specifications.Ceiling: CFL, White Painted with Black Round Diffuser

description: Luxury mirror polish stainless steel cabin
longDescription: Premium designer cabin featuring silver mirror polish stainless steel walls, jet black granite flooring, and LED ceiling with silver mirror polish SS for ultimate luxury.

specifications.Ceiling: LED, Silver Mirror Polish Stainless Steel

description: Contemporary glass cabin with gold accents
longDescription: Ultra-modern designer cabin with transparent etched laminated glass walls, brown stone flooring, and LED ceiling with gold mirror polish stainless steel for a sophisticated look.

specifications.Ceiling: LED, Gold Mirror Polish, Stainless Steel

description: Complete range of car operating panels with various display technologies
longDescription: Choose from our comprehensive range of car operating panels including 7 Segment Display, Dot Matrix Display, LCD Display, Digital LCD Display, and Handrail COP options. Please visit our showroom for the latest and wide selection of designs.

specifications.Display Types: 7 Segment, Dot Matrix, LCD, Digital LCD

tagline: Complete landing panel and door solutions
description: Comprehensive range of landing panels and door systems
longDescription: Complete selection of landing operating panels including Hall Display, Touch LOP, and Push Button LOP. Door options include Manual Collapsible, Manual Imperforated, Manual Wooden Swing, Auto Telescopic, Auto Glass, and Auto Stainless Steel doors.

specifications.Panel Types: Hall Display, Touch LOP, Push Button LOP

advantages: Manual door options for cost efficiency
